title: Phyllorkis suavissima
taxonomy: Phyllorkis suavissima is a species of orchid native to southern Asia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is often classified within the genus Phyllorkis. However, some sources also place it within the genus Goodyera. Further research is needed to determine the most accurate classification for this plant. The classification of Phyllorkis suavissima is still a topic of debate among botanists.
